retell.command: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; : "${MCP_ROOT:?set MCP_ROOT}"; : "${RETELL_API_KEY:?set RETELL_API_KEY}"; cd "${MCP_ROOT}/retell-mcp-server" && RETELL_API_KEY="${RETELL_API_KEY}" node index.js'

hunter-io.command: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; : "${MCP_ROOT:?set MCP_ROOT}"; : "${HUNTER_API_KEY:?set HUNTER_API_KEY}"; cd "${MCP_ROOT}/hunter-io-mcp-server" && HUNTER_API_KEY="${HUNTER_API_KEY}" node dist/index.js'
